title: Modified Mob Spawners!
description: Replaces the top and bottom textures of Mob spawners with a new texture, while preserving the vanilla side textures.
body:
Another block texture adjustment that I hoped Mojang would add but it's been a few years, so now I've done it myself.

Similar to my Prismarine Bricks pack, it has bothered me that the top and bottom textures are the same as the side textures, so I went ahead and made a new texture to be applied on the top and bottom that I think makes sense and is more visually pleasing.


I've got more packs in the works that you won't want to miss out on, so be sure to subscribe for updates!

As always, thanks for checking out my pack, and let me know what you think!


### Terms & Conditions
- Feel free to use this in videos and such, just give me a shoutout or link back to this post in the description.
- You may include it in mod packs or use it on servers, just give credit when appropriate.
- Don't redistribute without my permission.
- I may adjust these terms and conditions at any time as needed.
